problem: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear
hypothesis: Casimir effect between nanoscale surfaces may resolve Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
